地图探索 Map Exploration

海特洛100%探索路线：电话亭、维特海默塔、谕石和隐藏传送点查漏 Hethereau 100% Exploration Route: Phone Booths, Towers, Oracle Stones and Hidden Teleports

发布时间：Published: 2026-05-23 作者：异环攻略站编辑部Author: NTE Guide Editorial Team 阅读时间：13 分钟Read time: 13 min

攻略速览

海特洛探索的难点不是单个收集品，而是路线顺序。先点亮区域、建立传送网络，再清谕石、拍照、异象委托和隐藏宝箱，效率会远高于看到什么捡什么。本文适合 5 月开服玩家冲探索度和补漏。

前置条件与接取方式

推荐进度

主线已解锁主要城区，可自由驾驶和传送

必备工具

摩托车或高机动载具、已解锁的电话亭网络

目标收益

探索度、环石、养成材料、隐藏宝箱和传送效率

100%探索路线

按区域推进，不要反复横跳

1

先点亮维特海默塔

把灰色区域变成可读地图

未点亮区域时，小地图和任务指引都会变得不稳定。每到新区优先找高塔，确认道路、地形层级和附近传送点。

2

铺电话亭网络

沿主路、桥梁、商业区和高架入口顺路激活

电话亭是后续查漏的基础。建议先用载具跑一圈主干道，把跨区传送点全部点亮，再开始细清楼顶和室内点位。

3

清地面谕石

先处理低层和道路两侧，减少地图噪点

很多谕石就在街角、巷口和建筑入口附近。先清低层能快速提高探索度，也方便判断剩余点位是否在高处。

4

补高处与夹层

重点检查楼顶、广告牌、高架下方和地下通道

探索后期最容易漏的是垂直层级。看到地图点位重叠时，不要只在地面绕圈，应检查楼梯、电梯、管道和停车楼入口。

5

最后清异象委托

把战斗、解谜和隐藏宝箱一起处理

异象委托流程较长，建议等传送点齐全后再集中清理。完成后常会解锁周边宝箱或消除地图异常区域。

查漏重点

垂直地图误判

海特洛是立体城市，很多点位在楼顶、地下、室内或高架夹层。小地图距离很近不代表同一高度，查漏时要优先判断层级。

  • 点位贴近建筑边缘时，先找楼梯、消防梯、电梯或可攀爬外立面。
  • 高架和地下通道附近的收集品不要只看直线距离，入口往往在街区另一侧。
  • 探索度卡 95% 以上时，优先排查拍照打卡和异象委托后续宝箱。

完成奖励

环石 谕石兑换 隐藏宝箱 异象奖励 传送点解锁 探索度

海特洛 100% 探索最怕无序跑图。先塔、再电话亭、再低层、再高层、最后委托，是 5 月版本最省时间的通用路线。

完整解析

开放世界探索的效率取决于路线设计。很多玩家一开始看到收集品就去拿，结果后期缺少传送点，来回跑同一片城区。更稳的方式是先搭建交通网络，再按区域清单推进。

维特海默塔相当于每个区域的地图开关。它不仅让地图更容易阅读，也会帮助你判断道路层级和附近功能点。没有点亮塔就开始清收集，后期查漏成本会明显变高。

电话亭是 100% 探索的第二核心。建议按主干道跑一圈，把商业街、桥梁、高架口、住宅区边缘和副本入口附近的电话亭全部激活。这样后续无论刷材料、做支线还是补异象，都能直接传送。

探索后期要改变思路：不要问点位在地图哪里，而要问它在哪一层。海特洛大量内容分布在楼顶、地下、天桥、停车场和室内空间，小地图重叠只是提示，不是路线答案。

Guide Snapshot

Hethereau exploration is hard because of routing, not because of one collectible. Activate regions and teleports first, then clear oracle stones, photos, anomaly commissions and hidden chests. This is much more efficient than picking up whatever you see first.

Requirements and Entry

Recommended progress

Main districts unlocked with free driving and teleport access

Useful tools

Motorcycle or fast vehicle, plus an existing phone-booth network

Target rewards

Exploration progress, Annulith, growth materials, hidden chests and teleport efficiency

100% Exploration Route

Advance by district, not by random markers

1

Activate Wertheimer Towers

Turn gray regions into readable maps.

Each new district should start with the tower so roads, vertical layers and nearby teleports are easier to understand.

2

Build phone-booth coverage

Unlock booths along main roads, bridges, business areas and elevated-road entrances.

Run one vehicle loop around major roads before detailed rooftop or indoor cleanup.

3

Clear low-level oracle stones

Handle street-level and roadside points first.

This quickly raises exploration and helps identify which remaining markers are above or below you.

4

Clean high layers and gaps

Check rooftops, billboards, underpasses and underground passages.

Late exploration misses are usually vertical. Look for stairs, elevators, pipes and parking entrances.

5

Finish anomaly commissions

Handle combat, puzzles and hidden chests together.

Commissions are longer, so clear them after teleports are ready. They often unlock nearby chests or remove abnormal zones.

Cleanup Focus

Vertical map misreads

Hethereau is a layered city. A marker close on the minimap may be on a roof, underground, indoors or on an elevated road.

  • If a point hugs a building edge, search for stairs, fire escapes, elevators or climbable exteriors.
  • For elevated roads and tunnels, the entrance may be on the other side of the block.
  • When stuck above 95%, check photo spots and post-anomaly chests first.

Rewards

Annulith Oracle stone exchange Hidden chests Anomaly rewards Teleports Exploration percent

The time-saving route is tower, phone booth, low layer, high layer, then commissions. Use that order before relying on an interactive map for the final hidden points.

Full Analysis

Open-world exploration efficiency comes from route design. If you pick up every visible item first, you often lack teleports later and repeat the same district many times.

Wertheimer Towers are the regional map switches. They make the map readable and help identify road layers and nearby functions.

Phone booths are the second core. Unlock booths around commercial streets, bridges, elevated-road entrances, residential edges and dungeon entrances.

Late exploration is about height, not flat position. Hethereau places content on rooftops, underground paths, skybridges, parking structures and interiors.
